ground_truth_summary: VIC Health Club weekly schedule, 11 classes Mon-Fri, legend Blue=Yoga / Orange=Shaolin / Green=Fitness, footer 'Register online at https://vichealth.club' + QR code.

key_hits: All 11 classes with exact times, days, titles captured
Correct color-code mapping (Blue=Yoga, Orange=Shaolin, Green=Fitness)
Footer URL https://vichealth.club verbatim
Legend, header logo, QR code, decorative lotus all noted
Verbatim text block at end confirms perfect OCR
hallucinations: QR code described as having 'a small globe icon in the center' — not verifiable but plausible
evaluations.justification: Comprehensive, well-structured extraction with 100% schedule accuracy. Minor unverifiable detail on QR code center does not detract from correctness.

evaluations.justification: Perfect schedule OCR and color coding. Only a minor icon-description inaccuracy that does not affect textual content accuracy.

summary: All 9 Q8 model variants achieved near-perfect extraction of the VIC Health Club weekly schedule, correctly capturing all 11 classes with accurate times, days, titles, and color coding, plus the footer URL and QR code. Scores cluster at 10 with only minor non-textual icon-description inaccuracies (e.g., the Osteoporosis Prevention icon) and trivial color-shade quibbles about the black footer; qwen3.5-4b-Q8|nothink scored 9 due to additional speculative commentary and an unverifiable QR globe claim.
